title: Problem with board dropdown when adding item in dashboard (calendar view)
excerpt: When I try to add a new item in my dashboard calendar view (“Brand dash”), no matter what board I select from the drop-down, the new item will not change from the first board in the list (the “Content” board). Before the…

posts.author: NickS (Nick Schultz)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I try to add a new item in my dashboard calendar view (“Brand dash”), no matter what board I select from the drop-down, the new item will not change from the first board in the list (the “Content” board). Before the winter break, I was able to add new items from this view, mainly to our “Social Media” board, but that no longer seems to work.

I’ve tried removing and re-adding the “Social Media” board to the dashboard, but it still doesn’t work appropriately. Was there an update between Christmas and the second week of January that disabled this functionality?

Screenshot of the dashboard drop-down:

Screenshot 2024-01-11 at 4.42.57 PM1920×1080 56.6 KB

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @NickS ,

Welcome to the monday community!

As far as I am aware, this should be working ,and it seems to me you are facing a bug.

I would suggest contacting monday support.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
